strengths: 15+ years of software engineering experience across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, AI-agent infrastructure)
Proven expertise in AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling (MCP, code generators, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial experience as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geospatial platform used by NGOs
concerns: Lacks explicit AI/ML specialization (e.g., no PhD, publications, or AI product leadership in resume)
No demonstrated cloud platform strategy experience (only mentions AWS CDK briefly)
Limited evidence of advising strategic customers/partners on AI technologies
response.justification: The candidate meets the minimum 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates relevant AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq. However, there is no clear evidence of AI/ML specialization (e.g., PhD, publications) or cloud platform strategy leadership. Strategic customer advisory experience is also absent. The entrepreneurial background is strong but not directly aligned with AI cloud strategy.
